---
# abstract: |
#   This document is only a demo explaining how to use the template.
---

# Heading

Content cited from @mathurEffects2023 and @cayleyCreation2023 is also with a footnote [^sample]

This text continues

[^sample]: this is a sample footnote

![Sample figure](../public/placeholder.svg){#fig-sample width=25%}

# Bibliography

:::{#refs}
:::
